scope: S4096 one-MI350 BF16 compact variable-row Triton grouped-GEMM probe for the two dominant routed-MoE dgrad-style contractions.

run.external_gpu_state: A separate Python job was active on GPU 1; this probe was pinned to GPU 0.

decision.read: The compact Triton probe is correct and removes the 1.375x padded-row work, but the naive tile schedule loses 2.6-3.1x to padded torch.bmm(out=). This confirms that row compaction alone is insufficient; the replacement must preserve high MFMA utilization and avoid per-expert tiny-M launch/scheduling inefficiency.
do_not_promote: Current standalone Triton compact variable-row grouped GEMM for W2 dgrad
Current standalone Triton compact variable-row grouped GEMM for W1/W3 xgrad
focus_next: A custom CK/CK-Tile or TileLang grouped kernel specialized for M around 45-88, K/N = 7168/3072 and 3072/7168, with row compaction but library-like MFMA efficiency.
A fused backward kernel that combines W2 dgrad, SwiGLU derivative, W1/W3 xgrad accumulation, and compact-to-token reduce, so launch and memory traffic savings offset custom scheduling cost.
Wgrad bundling remains a separate required path; the dgrad-only compact tile is not sufficient for full-layer promotion.

commands.w2_dgrad: ssh do-sonle-kernel "docker exec -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -w /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 b9d33e6e8227 bash -lc 'PYTHONPATH=/local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 python3 dsv4_layer_microbench/probe_triton_compact_grouped_gemm.py --tokens 4096 --hidden 7168 --intermediate 3072 --experts 384 --topk 6 --dtype bfloat16 --op w2_dgrad --warmup 2 --iters 5 --block-m 8 16 32 --block-n 64 128 --block-k 64 --num-warps 4 8 --check --json --summary-path /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531/profiles/triton_compact_s4096_20260531/triton_compact_s4096_w2_dgrad/summary.json'"
commands.w1_xgrad: ssh do-sonle-kernel "docker exec -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -w /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 b9d33e6e8227 bash -lc 'PYTHONPATH=/local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 python3 dsv4_layer_microbench/probe_triton_compact_grouped_gemm.py --tokens 4096 --hidden 7168 --intermediate 3072 --experts 384 --topk 6 --dtype bfloat16 --op w1_xgrad --warmup 2 --iters 5 --block-m 8 16 32 --block-n 64 128 --block-k 64 --num-warps 4 8 --check --json --summary-path /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531/profiles/triton_compact_s4096_20260531/triton_compact_s4096_w1_xgrad/summary.json'"
